badges.label: Live Capability
badges.description: Currently available contact, planning, or information capability.

badges.label: Operator-Assisted
badges.description: Requires direct operator handling before acceptance or confirmation.

badges.label: Development
badges.description: Planned or shell-only capability that is not live.

badges.label: Restricted
badges.description: Unavailable or restricted unless later approved.

badges.label: Referral / Third-Party
badges.description: May route to a provider, affiliate, API, or external referral path after review.

badges.label: Planning Value
badges.description: Value is planning, itinerary control, review, or command hub organization.

badges.label: Operator Review Required
badges.description: Final availability, pricing, vehicle assignment, provider routing, and service confirmation require operator review.

badges.label: Quote Required
badges.description: Pricing is prepared only after review of timing, route, guest count, scope, and capacity.

badges.label: Payment Pending
badges.description: Payment or deposit state is not complete.

badges.label: Confirmed
badges.description: Used only after operator approval, accepted quote, payment/deposit approval, and availability confirmation.
